name: ninja-pricer
description: Ninja Concepts' internal pricing simulator — MCP server + Claude skill for sales and admin workflows

plugins.name: ninja-pricer
plugins.description: Drive the Ninja Pricer pricing engine from Claude — build scenarios, apply bundles, generate quotes, and (for admins) tweak the product catalog. Bundles the ninja-pricer MCP server config and skills that teach Claude the tool surface, error handling, and a guided setup/repair flow.
